journal_entries.comments: 2024-08-12: prior splice failure during I-75 widening; resolved 4h22m by Apex Fiber crew. Reference incident IR-2024-0814.
2025-02-03: scheduled corridor maintenance (I-285 paving); 90-minute window 02:00-03:30 EDT, no traffic impact (TI-LFA absorbed reroute).
2025-04-19: cabinet drop hand-off acceptance; OTDR baseline recorded by Pinecrest Public Works.
